planet.name: Mars
planet.description: The red planet. Ancient river valleys and massive volcanoes hint at a wetter past. Prime candidate for colonization.

moons.name: Phobos
moons.description: Larger moon of Mars. Rapidly decaying orbit will eventually collide with Mars.

moons.name: Deimos
moons.description: Smaller moon of Mars. Gradually escaping Mars's gravity.

stations.name: Olympus Station
stations.description: Research and supply station in Martian orbit.
